paragraph: The single-family market in Ramsey is moving briskly. Thirty-four homes sold over six months at a median of $913,500, and the numbers tell you sellers are in a real seller's market. Fifty-three percent of homes are selling above asking, the sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.03, and the median time on market is 19 days. Homes that are priced right are drawing multiple offers and moving fast. The range is wide, from $470,000 to $2.45 million, which reflects the town's mix of lot sizes and renovation levels, but what matters is that at every price point, competition is real. Condos and townhouses move even faster, with 25 sales at a median of $605,000 and a median days on market of 12. Sixty-four percent of units are selling above asking, and the sale-to-list ratio of 1.04 confirms that buyers are bidding up. If you're shopping single-family in Ramsey right now, you'll want to move decisively once you find the right house. If a condo fits your lifestyle and budget, you're stepping into an even tighter inventory situation where priced homes don't last long.
